name: Sopaipillas
recipeIngredient: 1 1/4 cups Water or more if needed
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift dry ingredients together.
2. Cut in shortening until crumbly.
3. Add water and mix until holds together.
4. Knead 10-15 times until dough forms a smooth ball.
5. Cover and let rest for 20 minutes.
6. Divide dough into two parts.
7. Roll dough to 1/8 inch thickness on lightly floured board.
8. Cut into 3-inch squares or triangles.
9. Do not allow to dry; cover those waiting to be fried.
10. When ready to fry, turn upside down so that surface on bottom while resting is on top when frying.
11. Fry in 3-inch hot oil until golden brown, turning once.
12. Add only a few at a time to maintain proper temperature.
13. Drain on paper towels.
